mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Excessively high inflation (CPIAUCSL > 250) signals potential central bank intervention, leading to higher discount rates and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite CPIAUCSL > 250, or Rank IC > 0.05 in high-inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in industrial production (INDPRO) and housing starts (HOUST) signals robust supply-side expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are negative in > 50% of periods where INDPRO and HOUST both rise, or pairwise correlation between proxies drops below 0.3.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in unemployment (UNRATE < 4%) indicates tight labor markets, prompting corporate pricing power and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite UNRATE < 4%, or Rank IC < 0.02 in tight-labor periods.

mechanism_narrative: Strong consumer demand (RSAFS > 490,000M) correlates with elevated corporate earnings, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite RSAFS > 490000, or Rank IC < 0.03 in high-demand periods.

mechanism_narrative: Weak payroll growth (PAYEMS < 140,000) signals slack in the labor market, leading to lower corporate revenue expectations and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite PAYEMS < 140000, or Rank IC > 0.04 in low-payroll periods.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1 < 17,200B) indicates weakening economic fundamentals, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of triggered instances despite GDPC1 < 17200, or Rank IC > 0.03 in contraction periods.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production (INDPRO < 105) signals supply chain disruptions, leading to higher corporate costs and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite INDPRO < 105, or Rank IC > 0.02 in supply-disruption periods.
